title: US says Hormuz to be toll-free under Iran deal
summary_full: The signing will kick off a 60-day period in which Tehran and Washington will try to hammer out a full-scale peace deal
summary_public: The signing will kick off a 60-day period in which Tehran and Washington will try to hammer out a full-scale peace deal
